testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
09:44:43.288 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.omnicharge.notificationservice.NotificationServiceApplicationTests]: NotificationServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:44:43.696 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.omnicharge.notificationservice.NotificationServiceApplication for test class com.omnicharge.notificationservice.NotificationServiceApplicationTests 09:44:43.990 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.omnicharge.notificationservice.NotificationServiceApplicationTests]: NotificationServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:44:43.995 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.omnicharge.notificationservice.NotificationServiceApplication for test class com.omnicharge.notificationservice.NotificationServiceApplicationTests 09:44:45.564 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
